title: Lead Revenue Manager at dnata India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at dnata India
jsonLd.description:
We at dnata India are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About dnata India:
dnata India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
